title: PlayerRadar
description: Detect nearby players and display their direction, distance, and alerts right above your hotbar — a tactical radar for Minecraft explorers and PvP players.
body:
# 🛰️ PlayerRadar

PlayerRadar is a lightweight Fabric client mod that adds a small radar HUD above your hotbar.  
It detects nearby players in real time and displays their name, direction, and distance.

The mod works entirely client-side, meaning no server installation is required.

---

# ✨ Features

- Compact radar overlay centered above the hotbar
- Detects nearby players in real time
- Shows player name, direction (N, S, E, W), and distance in meters
- Colored distance indicators:
  - 🟥 Red: < 30m
  - 🟨 Yellow: < 75m
  - 🟩 Green: > 75m
- Optional sound alert when a player enters radar range
- Fully client-side – works on any server
- Smooth integration with the Minecraft HUD
- Language support (English / German)

---

# ⚙️ Commands

All settings can be controlled using the `/pr` command.

Radar Control
`/pr on|off`

Sound Alerts
`/pr sound on|off`

Radar HUD
`/pr hud on|off`

Language
`/pr language english|german`

Commands support auto-complete (tab suggestions).

---

# 💡 Notes

This mod is intended for informational and fun use in multiplayer or private servers.

It does not provide unfair gameplay advantages such as x-ray or ESP.  
The radar only tracks players that are already loaded by the client.
